sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23741" key="deipna/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δειπν-άριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεῖπνον,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:64:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.10</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
